species: Here we investigate possible modes of action against Trypanosoma brucei using orthogonal chemo-proteomic and genomic approaches.
disease_state: SCYX-7158, an oxaborole, is currently in Phase I clinical trials for the treatment of human African trypanosomiasis.
sample_source: Bloodstream-form T. brucei ‘single marker’ cells were cultured at 37°C with 5% CO2 in HMI9T medium.
strain: To identify genetic determinants that may be involved in drug resistance to the oxaborole class, we sequenced the genomes of the susceptible parental strain Lister 427...
